productDisplayName: Indian Terrain Men Houston White Tshirts
description: "Mail By Aniket Keshi & Syed, on 25 April 2012" Composition Indigo pique polo neck t-shirt with white and red stripes, made of 100% cotton, has a twill collar, short sleeves with ribbed hems and stitch detailing with eyelets below the arms, buttoned chest placket with stitch reinforcement, a vented hem and embroidered brand logo on left chest Fitting Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Hand wash or machine wash cold using mild detergent Do not wring or bleach Flat dry in shade Do not iron on print Stripes that add immense style to your casual look is what indian terrain brings into your life. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this stylish Houston t-shirt from the brand's Pier 17 collection, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. What is even better is the addition of eyelets below the sleeves for enhanced ventilation, allowing you stay dry and fresh. The ribbed sleeve hems sit snug on well toned arms, and the vented hem offers a comfortable Fit around the waist. Pair it with denims or corduroys and Sports or suede shoes to look like the king of casual wear. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 6& rsquo Shoulders: 18& rdquo
